title: lobelia incana
intro: Lobelia incana, also known as blue lobelia or Canadian lobelia, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia incana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Lobelia incana can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
